title: hieracium hypeuryum subsp. obtusifolium
intro: Hieracium hypeuryum subsp. obtusifolium, also known as a lesser hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium hypeuryum subsp. obtusifolium include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for digestive issues and other health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed for their medicinal properties.
